commandDescription: Commands related to TripSit's learning portal
ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
linkSubcommand: Link your discord with your TripSitLearn account
emailOption: What email did you use to register on moodle?
unlinkSubcommand: Unlink your discord with your TripSitLearn account
profileSubcommand: Show someone's TripSitLearn profile, including the courses they have completed!
userOption: Who are you looking up? Defaults to you.
notAllowedToUse: You are not allowed to use this option!
invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email address!
foundMoreThanOne: Found more than one user with with that value!
foundNoUsers: Found no users with that value!
notLinked:
{{user}} does not have a linked TSL account!
Ask them to sign up and use `/learn link` to link their account!
